remarks: A rare opportunity to build a significant Greenwich estate in one of the town's most desirable locations. 2.43 level acres in a 1 acre zone with no wetlands, this property is a mere three minutes from town and offers space for an exceptional 14,000SF (above grade) main residence with pool, tennis court and an 800SF secondary structure. Final stages of town approval for residence and eight-bedroom septic system. Located on a quiet, coveted lane surrounded by distinguished properties, this offering combines the convenience of a central Greenwich location with the scale and privacy typically found much farther from town. A unique opportunity to bring a fully envisioned estate to life.
